action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 25 eval succeeded with AUC 0.9498 on (likely) val data, after fixing predict.py to copy fallback test.pt. The model was DKT (3 layers, hidden=512, embed=256) trained for 40 epochs. Training loss likely still declining, so more capacity and longer training may further improve AUC. Time budget: 0.433h (~26 min), 5 iterations left. Analysis: Larger model (4 layers, hidden=512, dropout=0.4) + 60 epochs may push AUC higher; early stopping prevents overfitting. Decision: Write updated train.py with bigger DKT, longer training, gradient clipping, and early stopping. Train, then immediately submit eval to update score. If improvement, later iterations can fine-tune further.
